title: Installing marketplace apps just became easier

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community! I’m Omer from the marketplace team and I’m excited to share some improvements we’ve made to the process of requesting and installing marketplace apps on your monday.com account.

What’s new:

  • New “Manage Apps” page for Admins: No longer hidden in the administration section, there’s a new central place in the marketplace for admins to manage requests and see what needs attention. You’ll even see red-dot indicators for new app requests!

    image1920×828 66.9 KB

  • Listing page actions for admins: Admins can now approve or reject requests directly from the app listing page, with the option to include a reason for rejection.

    image964×752 70.5 KB

  • Clearer Status for Non-Admins: Users can now see the request status right on the app listing page. Plus, we’ve introduced new approval and rejection emails (not just notifications) for better visibility.

We believe these changes will create a smoother experience for everyone. Let us know what you think!
